dashboard.label: SecureVector — AI Threat Monitor (OCSF)
dashboard.description: Operational overview of SecureVector Local Threat Monitor events forwarded via HEC. Source: sourcetype=securevector:ocsf. Schema: OCSF 1.3.0 (class 2001 scans, 1007 tool-call audits). Import: Splunk Web > Dashboards > Create > Source, paste XML.

search.query: sourcetype=securevector:ocsf class_uid=2001 severity="BLOCK" device.uid="$device_uid$" | stats count
sourcetype=securevector:ocsf class_uid=2001 severity IN ("DETECTED","REVIEW") device.uid="$device_uid$" | stats count
sourcetype=securevector:ocsf class_uid=1007 unmapped.action="block" device.uid="$device_uid$" | stats count
sourcetype=securevector:ocsf device.uid="$device_uid$" | stats dc(device.uid) as devices
sourcetype=securevector:ocsf $min_sev$ device.uid="$device_uid$" | timechart span=15m count by severity

sourcetype=securevector:ocsf class_uid=2001 finding.techniques{}.uid=* device.uid="$device_uid$" | stats count by finding.techniques{}.uid | sort -count | head 10 | rename finding.techniques{}.uid as technique

sourcetype=securevector:ocsf class_uid=2001 unmapped.matched_rule_ids{}=* $min_sev$ device.uid="$device_uid$" | stats count, dc(finding.uid) as unique_findings by unmapped.matched_rule_ids{} | sort -count | head 20 | rename unmapped.matched_rule_ids{} as rule_id

sourcetype=securevector:ocsf actor.user.name=* $min_sev$ device.uid="$device_uid$" | eval who=actor.user.name." @ ".coalesce(actor.process.name, "-") | stats count, dc(finding.uid) as findings by who | sort -count | head 20

sourcetype=securevector:ocsf class_uid=2001 finding.related_events_uid{}=* $min_sev$ device.uid="$device_uid$" | stats count, values(severity) as severities, values(finding.title) as titles, min(_time) as first_seen, max(_time) as last_seen by finding.related_events_uid{} | eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | sort -count | head 25 | rename finding.related_events_uid{} as group_id
sourcetype=securevector:ocsf suppressed_count=* device.uid="$device_uid$" | timechart span=15m sum(suppressed_count) as suppressed, count as allowed

sourcetype=securevector:ocsf class_uid=1007 device.uid="$device_uid$" | stats min(unmapped.seq) as first_seq, max(unmapped.seq) as last_seq, count as rows by device.uid | eval expected=last_seq-first_seq+1 | eval gap=expected-rows | table device.uid, first_seq, last_seq, rows, gap

sourcetype=securevector:ocsf severity_id>=4 device.uid="$device_uid$" | table _time, class_name, severity, finding.title, actor.user.name, actor.process.name, device.uid, finding.techniques{}.uid, unmapped.matched_rule_ids{} | sort -_time | head 100
